ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., 20MICRONS, 3IINFOTECH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock data was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the stock is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "underlying_close_price" REAL /* Underlying close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "underlying_previous_day_close_price" REAL /* Underlying previous day close price of the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the volatility data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility data */,
  "underlying_log_returns" REAL /* Underlying log returns of the stock on the given date */,
  "previous_day_underlying_volatility" REAL /* Previous day underlying volatility of the stock */,
  "rolling_volatility_30d" REAL /* 30-day rolling volatility of the stock */,
  "rolling_volatility_60d" REAL /* 60-day rolling volatility of the stock */,
  "rolling_volatility_90d" REAL /* 90-day rolling volatility of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annualized_volatility" (
  "annualized_volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annualized volatility entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the annualized volatility data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the annualized volatility data */,
  "current_day_underlying_daily_volatility" REAL /* Current day underlying daily volatility of the stock */,
  "underlying_annualised_volatility" REAL /* Underlying annualized volatility of the stock */,
  "rolling_annualized_volatility_30d" REAL /* 30-day rolling annualized volatility of the stock */,
  "rolling_annualized_volatility_60d" REAL /* 60-day rolling annualized volatility of the stock */,
  "rolling_annualized_volatility_90d" REAL /* 90-day rolling annualized volatility of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annualized_volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annualized_volatility_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the sector data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the industry data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_industry_map" (
  "sector_industry_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector-industry mapping */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_industry_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_industry_map_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_industry_map_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
